# interlink_status (Data Source)

Fetches the current operational status of the Inter.link platform.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `has_ongoing_maintenance` (Boolean) Whether there is maintenance currently in progress.
- `has_planned_maintenance` (Boolean) Whether there is planned maintenance scheduled.
- `status` (String) Overall platform status (e.g. `success`).
